overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along a futuristic waterfront promenade, transitioning through an urban plaza and covered stairway, and emerging onto a busy neon-lit commercial street with traffic and pedestrians. The scene features bright midday sunlight, clear skies, and vibrant cyberpunk architecture with holographic billboards.

events.description: beginning walk along waterfront promenade from the water's edge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade, passing pedestrians leaning on railings and sitting on benches

notable_agents.action: man leaning on stainless steel railing looking out at the water
person sitting on bench using a handheld device

entered.detail: calm body of water with distant city skyline visible on horizon
bright yellow metal ladder descending into the water from concrete platform
metal safety railing running along the edge of the promenade
large multi-level futuristic building with orange and teal accents and digital signage
tall digital display screen showing advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the water's edge of a futuristic city, showing a calm bay with a yellow ladder descending into the water. The camera walks along a concrete promenade lined with stainless steel railings, passing pedestrians who lean on the rails or sit on benches. To the left, a massive cyberpunk-style mall building with orange and teal architecture dominates the view, while palm trees cast shadows on the walkway.

events.description: turning away from waterfront into open urban plaza
approaching underpass entrance, lighting becomes darker and more shadowed

agents.ego_description: turning inland away from the waterfront and crossing the open plaza toward the underpass stairs

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking ahead toward the underpass entrance
person in red pants walking across the plaza

entered.detail: wide open concrete plaza with geometric patterns and planters
dark tunnel entrance with orange structural beams
illuminated signage above the underpass entrance
wall covered in colorful graffiti art near the underpass

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left away from the water into a wide urban plaza with moderate pedestrian traffic. The space opens up with concrete ground patterns and planters, leading toward a dark underpass entrance framed by orange structural beams. A neon sign glows above the tunnel entrance as the camera approaches, and the lighting gradually shifts to darker shadows. The mall building recedes into the left background while graffiti-covered walls appear on the right.

events.description: entering covered underpass and beginning ascent of stairs
climbing steep concrete stairs toward street level

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs through the covered underpass, following other pedestrians upward

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket ascending the stairs ahead
person in dark clothing descending the stairs toward camera

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase ascending through the underpass
overhead concrete covering creating a tunnel-like effect
large colorful graffiti artwork covering the left wall
graffiti tags and art on the right wall of the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered underpass and begins ascending a wide concrete staircase. The environment becomes enclosed and dimly lit, with the sky no longer visible overhead. Both walls of the stairwell are covered in extensive graffiti murals and tags. Other pedestrians are seen both ascending ahead and descending toward the camera. The space feels urban and gritty, transitioning from the open plaza to the enclosed vertical passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial street with neon billboards and traffic

events.description: exiting underpass onto busy commercial street with neon signage
cars passing by on the multi-lane road to the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy city sidewalk next to traffic, passing various pedestrians and observing the street

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving along the street
person wearing red cap and blue pants walking ahead on sidewalk

entered.detail: large vertical neon sign reading CALIENTE on building facade
massive floating holographic advertisement above the street
row of palm trees separating sidewalk from the road
multi-lane asphalt road with moving vehicle traffic
tall modern skyscraper with reflective glass windows

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the scene opens onto a bustling commercial street lined with palm trees and neon signage. The famous CALIENTE neon sign glows prominently on a building to the right, while massive holographic billboards float above the traffic. The camera walks along the sidewalk next to a multi-lane road with moderate vehicle traffic, passing diverse pedestrians. The lighting is mixed with bright sunlight and building shadows, creating a vibrant cyberpunk city atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a serene waterfront promenade into the gritty depths of an urban underpass before emerging onto a vibrant, neon-lit commercial street. It begins at the water's edge, moving along a concrete walkway lined with stainless steel railings and palm trees beside a massive orange and teal mall. As the camera turns away from the bay, the scene opens into a wide urban plaza with concrete patterns and planters, gradually shifting toward darker shadows as it approaches a tunnel entrance framed by orange beams and glowing neon. The camera then enters the enclosed underpass, ascending a wide concrete staircase flanked by graffiti-covered walls while passing other pedestrians in the dimly lit passage. Finally, the environment expands as the camera emerges from the tunnel onto a bustling street, where bright sunlight mixes with the glow of holographic billboards and the prominent CALIENTE neon sign above a flow of city traffic.
